data.content:
I can see you have an MSTest project targeting .NET 8.0. The second test expects `15.00m` for express but the method returns `10.00m` — that'll fail.

Let me start `dotnet watch test` so tests re-run automatically whenever you save a file:

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Start dotnet watch test with hot reload

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Start dotnet watch test with hot reload

data.reasoningText:
The user wants to use hot reload to iterate on failing tests. I can see there's an MSTest project with .NET 8.0. The `dotnet watch test` command will re-run tests automatically when files change.

Looking at the tests, the second test `CalculateShipping_ExpressDelivery_Returns15` expects `15.00m` but the method returns `10.00m` for "express", so that test will fail.

Let me set up `dotnet watch test` for them.

arguments.description: Start dotnet watch test with hot reload
